Watch YouTube
without the profanity.

Safeplay quietly removes profanity as videos play. Nothing to set up — just pick your filter strength.

WHAT YOU HEAR
Before
"What the **** is going on here?"
After
"What the removed is going on here?"

Pick a filter strength.

You can change this anytime from the popup.

You're all set.

On any YouTube video, click the red Safeplay button next to Subscribe to start filtering.

LOOK FOR THIS ON ANY VIDEO
Channel
284K subs
Subscribe
